user_prompt: Ready the phosphor blaster for cooling
prayer:
Approach the phosphor blaster with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to grant cooling grace unto its sacred conduits.
Anoint the phosphor blaster's vents with cryo-blessed unguents, invoking the Machine Spirit's chill embrace.
Initiate the cooling rites upon the phosphor blaster, chanting the Canticle of Thermal Equilibrium.
Verify the phosphor blaster's essence flows pure and frigid, sanctified for battle's fury.

user_prompt: My Skorpius Disintegrator is ready for targeting
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the Skorpius Disintegrator, whispering litanies to awaken its targeting augurs.
Sanctify the Skorpius Disintegrator's auspex arrays with sacred oils, aligning them to the Omnissiah's gaze.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Skorpius Disintegrator for targeting precision, reciting the Prayer of Unerring Aim.
Calibrate the targeting matrices whilst intoning binaric hymns, ensuring lethal concordance.
Affirm the Skorpius Disintegrator's sights burn true in the Emperor's wrath.

user_prompt: Ready the optical mechadendrite for blessing
prayer:

Anoint the optical mechadendrite's lenses with opti-sanctified polish, chanting the Rite of Clarified Vision.
Invoke divine blessing upon the optical mechadendrite, harmonizing its photoreceptors to perfection.
Witness the optical mechadendrite gleam with Omnissianic favour, ready for scrutiny.

prayer:

Beseech the Machine Spirit of the cortex implant to assimilate the loading without corruption.
Seal the cortex implant's interfaces, affirming neural sanctity in the Machine God's name.

In dire haste, encircle the optical mechadendrite with wards of preparation against entropy.
Anoint the optical mechadendrite's servos with mech-sanctified lubricants, invoking readiness.
Chant the Litany of Preparation over the optical mechadendrite, awakening its vigilant gaze.
Align the optical mechadendrite's focusing arrays to the Omnissiah's will.
Test the optical mechadendrite's preparedness, ensuring unblemished perception.

Initiate the preparation sequence with binaric psalms, harmonizing motive systems.

Commune with the las-cutter in solemn vigil, offering diagnostics to reveal hidden flaws.
Scan the las-cutter's power cells with auspex-incantations, invoking the Omnissiah's diagnostic light.
Purge any errant code from the las-cutter whilst reciting the Canticle of Systemic Purity.
Affirm the Machine Spirit of the las-cutter through exhaustive diagnostics, restoring perfection.
Seal the las-cutter with wards, its diagnostics complete in binary harmony.

Enfold the Vindicator in protective litanies during its operation, shielding from xenos taint.

Witness the Vindicator roar sanctified, operation blessed by the Motive Force.

Initiate startup protocols upon the mechadendrite, aligning to Omnissianic purpose.
